lessons.name: Unit 7: Natural Wonders of the World
lessons.chapter: Unit 7: Natural Wonders of the World
lessons.description: Learn about natural wonders with reported Yes/No questions.

theory.title: Unit 7: Natural Wonders of the World

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Natural wonders: mountain, volcano, waterfall, canyon, cave, desert, forest, rainforest, glacier, iceberg, coral reef, hot spring

Geographical features: peak, summit, cliff, valley, river, lake, ocean, sea, island, peninsula, bay, coast

Adjectives: magnificent, spectacular, breathtaking, stunning, impressive, majestic, beautiful, amazing, incredible, enormous, vast, deep

Actions: explore, discover, climb, hike, trek, visit, admire, protect, preserve, conserve

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about natural wonders, geographical features, and environmental protection.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Reported Yes/No Questions (Tường thuật câu hỏi Yes/No)

A. Cấu trúc:

  • S + asked (+ O) + if/whether + S + V (lùi thì)
  • Ex: "Do you like mountains?" → He asked me if/whether I liked mountains.

B. Quy tắc lùi thì:

  • Present Simple → Past Simple
  • Ex: "Do you like it?" → He asked if I liked it.
  • Present Continuous → Past Continuous
  • Ex: "Are you studying?" → She asked if I was studying.
  • Past Simple → Past Perfect
  • Ex: "Did you go?" → He asked if I had gone.
  • Will → Would
  • Ex: "Will you come?" → She asked if I would come.
  • Can → Could
  • Ex: "Can you help?" → He asked if I could help.
  • May → Might
  • Ex: "May I go?" → She asked if she might go.

C. Thay đổi đại từ và trạng từ:

  • I → he/she
  • you → I/he/she (tùy ngữ cảnh)
  • we → they
  • my → his/her
  • your → my/his/her
  • here → there
  • now → then
  • today → that day
  • tomorrow → the next day/the following day
  • yesterday → the day before/the previous day
  • this → that
  • these → those

D. Lưu ý quan trọng:

  • Không đảo trợ động từ trong câu tường thuật
  • Direct: "Do you like it?"
  • Reported: He asked if I liked it. (không phải "if did I like")
  • If và Whether: có thể dùng thay thế cho nhau
  • Ex: He asked if I liked it. = He asked whether I liked it.

E. Ví dụ chi tiết:

  • "Do you like mountains?" → He asked me if I liked mountains.
  • "Are you visiting Ha Long Bay?" → She asked me if I was visiting Ha Long Bay.
  • "Did you climb the mountain?" → He asked me if I had climbed the mountain.
  • "Will you go there?" → She asked me if I would go there.
  • "Can you see the waterfall?" → He asked me if I could see the waterfall.

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Lùi thì Present → Past
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • S + asked + if/whether + S + V (past)
  • Present Simple → Past Simple
  • Present Continuous → Past Continuous

examples.question: "Do you like mountains?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me if/whether I liked mountains.
examples.explanation: Do you like → if/whether I liked (lùi thì, không đảo)

examples.question: "Are you visiting Ha Long Bay?" → She asked me ______.
examples.solution: She asked me if/whether I was visiting Ha Long Bay.
examples.explanation: Are you visiting → if/whether I was visiting

examples.question: "Does she live here?" → He asked ______.
examples.explanation: Does she live here → if/whether she lived there (here → there)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Lùi thì với Will/Can/May
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Will → Would
  • Can → Could
  • May → Might

examples.question: "Will you go there?" → She asked me ______.
examples.solution: She asked me if/whether I would go there.
examples.explanation: Will you go → if/whether I would go

examples.question: "Can you see the waterfall?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me if/whether I could see the waterfall.
examples.explanation: Can you see → if/whether I could see

examples.question: "May I take a photo?" → She asked ______.
examples.solution: She asked if/whether she might take a photo.
examples.explanation: May I → if/whether she might (I → she)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Lùi thì Past Simple → Past Perfect
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Did + V → if/whether + S + had + V3
  • Past Simple → Past Perfect

examples.question: "Did you climb the mountain?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me if/whether I had climbed the mountain.
examples.explanation: Did you climb → if/whether I had climbed

examples.question: "Did she visit the cave?" → He asked ______.
examples.solution: He asked if/whether she had visited the cave.
examples.explanation: Did she visit → if/whether she had visited

examples.question: "Did they see the waterfall?" → She asked ______.
examples.solution: She asked if/whether they had seen the waterfall.
examples.explanation: Did they see → if/whether they had seen

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Thay đổi đại từ và trạng từ
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • you → I/he/she
  • here → there
  • now → then
  • today → that day
  • tomorrow → the next day

examples.question: "Are you here now?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me if/whether I was there then.
examples.explanation: you → I; here → there; now → then

examples.question: "Will you visit this place tomorrow?" → She asked me ______.
examples.solution: She asked me if/whether I would visit that place the next day.
examples.explanation: you → I; this → that; tomorrow → the next day

examples.question: "Did you go there yesterday?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me if/whether I had gone there the day before.
examples.explanation: Did you go → if/whether I had gone; yesterday → the day before

exercises.question: "Do you like mountains?" → He asked me ______ I liked mountains.
exercises.explanation: Yes/No question → if/whether

exercises.question: "Are you visiting Ha Long Bay?" → She asked me if I ______ Ha Long Bay.
exercises.explanation: Are you visiting → I was visiting

exercises.question: "Will you go there?" → She asked me if I ______ there.
exercises.explanation: Will you go → I would go

exercises.question: "Can you see the waterfall?" → He asked me if I ______ the waterfall.
exercises.explanation: Can you see → I could see

exercises.question: "Did you climb the mountain?" → He asked me if I ______ the mountain.
exercises.explanation: Did you climb → I had climbed

exercises.question: "Are you here now?" → He asked me if I was ______ ______.
exercises.explanation: here → there; now → then

exercises.question: "Does she live here?" → He asked if she ______ there.
exercises.explanation: Does she live → she lived

exercises.question: "May I take a photo?" → She asked if she ______ take a photo.
exercises.explanation: May I → she might

exercises.question: "Did they see the waterfall?" → She asked if they ______ the waterfall.
exercises.explanation: Did they see → they had seen

exercises.question: "Will you visit this place tomorrow?" → She asked me if I would visit ______ place ______.
exercises.explanation: this → that; tomorrow → the next day

exercises.question: Which are correct reported Yes/No questions? (Select all that apply)
options: He asked if I liked mountains.
She asked whether I was visiting.
He asked if did I go.
She asked if I could help.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: if I liked, whether I was visiting, if I could. Sai: if did I go (không đảo)

exercises.question: Which words can introduce Yes/No reported questions? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Yes/No questions dùng if hoặc whether. 'that' cho statements, 'what' cho Wh-questions

exercises.question: Which transformations are correct? (Select all that apply)
options: "Can you help?" → if I could help
"Will you go?" → if I would go
"Do you like it?" → if I like it
"Did you see?" → if I had seen
exercises.explanation: Đúng: could help, would go, had seen. Sai: if I like it (phải là 'liked')

exercises.question: Transform: "Do you like mountains?" → He asked me ______.
exercises.correct: if/whether I liked mountains / if I liked mountains / whether I liked mountains
exercises.explanation: Do you like → if/whether I liked

exercises.question: Transform: "Will you go there?" → She asked me ______.
exercises.correct: if/whether I would go there / if I would go there / whether I would go there
exercises.explanation: Will you go → if/whether I would go

exercises.question: Transform: "Did you climb the mountain?" → He asked me ______.
exercises.correct: if/whether I had climbed the mountain / if I had climbed the mountain / whether I had climbed the mountain
exercises.explanation: Did you climb → if/whether I had climbed

exercises.question: Transform: "Are you here now?" → He asked me ______.
exercises.correct: if/whether I was there then / if I was there then / whether I was there then
exercises.explanation: Are you here now → if/whether I was there then

exercises.question: Rearrange: asked / He / me / if / liked / I / mountains / . / asked / She / whether / was / I / visiting / Ha Long Bay / .
exercises.sample_answer: He asked me if I liked mountains. She asked whether I was visiting Ha Long Bay.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: asked + if/whether + S + V (lùi thì)

exercises.question: Transform: "Do you like natural wonders?" + "Will you visit them?" → He asked me... (Use reported questions)
exercises.sample_answer: He asked me if/whether I liked natural wonders. He asked me if/whether I would visit them.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Do you like → if/whether I liked; Will you visit → if/whether I would visit

exercises.question: Transform: "Can you see the waterfall?" + "Did you climb the mountain?" → She asked me... (Use reported questions)
exercises.sample_answer: She asked me if/whether I could see the waterfall. She asked me if/whether I had climbed the mountain.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Can you see → if/whether I could see; Did you climb → if/whether I had climbed

exercises.question: Rearrange: asked / He / if / was / I / there / then / . / asked / She / whether / would / I / visit / that / place / the next day / .
exercises.sample_answer: He asked if I was there then. She asked whether I would visit that place the next day.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: if/whether + S + V (lùi thì) + thay đổi trạng từ

exercises.question: Transform and combine: "Are you visiting Ha Long Bay now?" + "Will you climb the mountain tomorrow?" + "Did you see the waterfall yesterday?" → He asked me... (Use reported questions for all three)
exercises.sample_answer: He asked me if/whether I was visiting Ha Long Bay then. He asked me if/whether I would climb the mountain the next day. He asked me if/whether I had seen the waterfall the day before.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi cả 3 câu: Are you visiting now → if/whether I was visiting then; Will you climb tomorrow → if/whether I would climb the next day; Did you see yesterday → if/whether I had seen the day before
